provisional_note: Treatment-train ranking uses provisional criteria_weights with TOPSIS. C5 health-risk and field validation remain future work.

match_vs_suitability.explanation: Screening match ranks the train by scored criteria; suitability indicates whether stored evidence confirms the selected use case.
match_vs_suitability.note: Highest screening match has an evidence gap/conditional suitability. Also review the highest confirmed-suitability option: DEWATS modular train.

soil_filter_cautions: Conditional: requires confirmed soil/infiltration and groundwater/flood safety checks.

standards_coverage.note: Standards coverage note: COD, NH4-N, TP are used as supporting context because no stored target limit is available for irrigation reuse.
